incentive.statement: The visible Authority defaults and every no-input runtime fallback must agree on 1sg subject, 3sg object, and indicative present.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate the shell, runtime fallback, and focused verification change without altering grammar eligibility.

outcome: Fresh Direct, Causative, and Applicative Authority flows begin from the same main VNC subject, object, and tense defaults while preserving distinct embedded participant choices.

responsibilities.statement: Expose the requested selected options in the canonical Classical Authority shell.

actors.contribution: Set the visible main subject, main object, applicative imported object, and tense initial options.

responsibilities.statement: Use the same defaults in state capture, option contracts, availability reset, receipts, and result-only projections.

actors.contribution: Remove competing no-input fallbacks without changing explicit selections or grammar gates.

responsibilities.statement: Prove shell/runtime agreement and explicit-selection preservation with focused tests and browser evidence.

actors.contribution: Cover initial defaults and retained user overrides across the three derivation modes.

responsibilities.statement: Record the bounded target and focused evidence without starting full readiness.

actors.contribution: Keep the product-default change separate from grammar authorization and handoff readiness.

retirements.removalEvidence: Shell selections and every no-input runtime fallback now use present and 3sg; 1sg was retained as the main subject default.

evidence.result: Main UI and causative relation UI passed 393/393 assertions, including default agreement and explicit-selection preservation.
Direct opened at 1sg, 3sg, present; Causative retained main 1sg and present with separate embedded 3sg; Applicative showed imported 3sg with main 1sg and present.

closure.nextLessonEntryPoint: Select the next explicit implementation target; full readiness belongs to formal handoff.
